_comment: Source-of-truth payload for the merge queue configuration on `main`.
Apply via the GitHub UI (Settings → Branches → main → 'Require merge queue') or via REST:
Then in UI: Settings → Branches → main → check 'Require merge queue', set merge method = squash,
paste the values below into the form. (REST for queue config requires beta endpoints; UI is canonical.)
Tuned for ~1-2 PR/day MVP cadence: queue depth ≈ 0, fast feedback, low burn.
Re-tune if observed depth > 2 sustained or merge wait > 30 min.
